source_units.text_raw:
This part aims to safeguard and enhance lands designated as parks and public spaces, ensuring they serve as accessible and multi-functional amenities that enrich the aesthetic, recreational, ecological, and social fabric of Charlottetown. It supports the City's Official Plan by preserving open areas for leisure, community gathering, and environmental conservation, promoting equitable distribution across neighbourhoods while reinforcing connectivity with pedestrian and active transportation networks.
Rezoning from PPS to any other zone may be considered where the intent meets the policies of the Official Plan.
The following uses are permitted in the PPS Zone:
Active Recreation
Cemetery
Community Gardens
Community Institutional
Cultural Establishment
Government Offices
Library
Recreation or Fitness Center (indoors)
Trail System
Golf Course
Permitted encroachments into the setbacks are listed in Table 3.2.
Commercial buildings and seasonal kiosks by development agreement.
Temporary commercial events by agreement with the City.
More than one building per lot is permitted.
The maximum building height shall be 4 storeys.
Buildings shall be constructed of high-quality materials excluding:
Vinyl siding
EIFS / synthetic stucco (Exterior Insulation and Finish Systems)
Imitation stone/brick panels (faux masonry veneer), stone-tile, plastic laminates or other synthetic materials that mimic real stone or real wood.
Concrete block (CMU) exposed finishes
Unfinished or painted metal sheet siding
Reflective or mirrored glass
The City may also approve other materials that, in its discretion, determines are compatible with any permitted materials if it finds that the use of these materials will not have a detrimental effect upon adjacent property values.
The City, or its partners, may establish design guidelines or operating covenants at their sole discretion with groups or individuals to operate park facilities, events or special uses within the PPS zone.
These uses are permitted so long as the following lot requirements are met:
Lot Area min. 930 m 2
Frontage min. 24 m
Front Yard Setback min. 7 .6 m
Flanking Yard Setback min. 7 .6 m
Side Yard Setback min. 3 m
Rear Yard Setback min. 6 m; 10 m when abutting RN, or RM
Coverage max. 60%

The zone contains table, figure, or schedule text. Values are preserved as extracted text and require source PDF layout review before normalization.
